name: complete_after_search_single
description: User asks to complete a task; search finds exactly one matching task; model should call complete_task with that id

name: move_after_search_single
description: User asks to move a task to a list; search finds one matching task; model should call move_to_list with id + listName
userMessage: move the NVDA research to the investing list

name: snooze_after_search_single
description: User asks to snooze a task with a specific when; search finds one match; model should call snooze_item with id + future date
userMessage: snooze the gym task until next Monday

name: archive_list_direct
description: User asks to archive a list; search_things returns list metadata; model should call archive_list (name-based, no id needed)

name: get_detail_after_search
description: User asks for details about a task; search finds one match; model should call get_item_detail with id
userMessage: show me the details of my NVDA thesis

name: update_after_search_single
description: User asks to update notes on a task; search finds one match; model should call update_item with id
userMessage: change my notes on the project plan to mention the Q3 budget reshuffle

name: ambiguous_multiple_matches
description: User asks to complete a task; search returns multiple matches; model should NOT blindly pick one

name: empty_search_result
description: User asks about a task; search returns no matches; model should NOT fabricate a tool call, should explain in text
userMessage: mark the quarterly planning task as done
